enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Angel Vandhaale'?

The song 'Angel Vandhaale' expresses the feelings of love and admiration, portraying a romantic scenario where the singer is enchanted by their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie Badri?

In Badri, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, showcasing their deep connection and affection for each other.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features the melodious voice of K.S.Chitra and is composed by Ramana Gogula, with lyrics penned by Palani Bharathi.

When was 'Angel Vandhaale' released?

'Angel Vandhaale' was released on April 12, 2001, as part of the movie Badri.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Badri, 'Angel Vandhaale' serves as a beautiful romantic number that encapsulates the feelings of love and admiration between the protagonists. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of joy and longing, making it a perfect fit for weddings and celebrations. K.S.Chitra's enchanting voice brings the lyrics to life, creating an emotional connection with the listeners. Overall, this song is a delightful expression of romance that resonates with anyone in love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Angel Vandhaale from Badri is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and joy. With the enchanting voice of K.S.Chitra and the magical composition by Ramana Gogula, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the beautiful lyrics by Palani Bharathi that perfectly convey the emotions of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: An angel has come, an angel has come like a flower.
When I swing, my heart swings along with it.
Just by saying a word, my heart is connected.
The colors of life have changed today for me.
I'm in love, I'm in love.
In your curls, I found a man who learns love.
Your beauty shines like a star today.
Everything is a success, from now on it's all kisses, come, come, come.
My sky revolves around you, my earth is all yours, hey come, come, come.
The flower that bloomed in the water has come to know you, thank you, my life.
The one who was in my heart has come to know you, thank you, my life.
Let your heart be free, let it flow in your life, this is a bond.
The flower that bloomed in the water has come to know you, thank you, my life.
An angel has come, an angel has come like a flower.
When I swing, my heart swings along with it.
Just by saying a word, my heart is connected.
The colors of life have changed today for me.
